overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an industrial urban district with elevated metro structures, large cylindrical silos, and digital billboards. The character walks along a sidewalk, passes pedestrians, and crosses a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk beneath elevated metro tracks

events.description: passing a pedestrian wearing red pants walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated metro structure, passing industrial buildings and billboards

notable_agents.action: walking in the opposite direction wearing distinctive red pants

entered.detail: large industrial elevated highway with orange warning lights and metal truss framework
large digital screen displaying yellow and red advertisements on a dark building facade
silver metal guardrail running along the edge of the sidewalk
tan concrete pavement with scattered debris and paper
tall industrial structure with pipes and metal scaffolding

segments.scene_description: Walking along an industrial sidewalk beneath a massive elevated metro structure with orange lights. The area features digital billboards on the right and industrial buildings on the left. A pedestrian in red pants passes by walking in the opposite direction as the camera moves forward through the semi-covered urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with industrial silo and palm trees

events.description: emerging from under the elevated structure into a more open area with views of the industrial silo
approaching traffic light at intersection, waiting for signal to cross

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection while observing the large industrial silo and preparing to cross the street

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the road toward the intersection

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete industrial silo with metal pipes and scaffolding attached
tall palm trees planted along the sidewalk edge near the intersection
vertical traffic light showing red signal for pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera emerges from under the elevated metro tracks, revealing a massive cylindrical industrial silo on the left. Palm trees line the approach to the intersection where traffic signals control the flow of futuristic vehicles. The camera continues forward toward the crosswalk, transitioning from the covered sidewalk to the open intersection area.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalk and industrial buildings

events.description: stepping off the sidewalk and beginning to cross the multi-lane intersection
red delivery van and other vehicles passing through the intersection while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection, navigating between lanes of traffic while heading toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: red delivery van driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing with white stripes on dark asphalt
open area where multiple roads meet with traffic signals and manhole covers

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide asphalt intersection, moving from the sheltered sidewalk into the open street. A red delivery van and other futuristic vehicles pass by as the character navigates the crosswalk. The industrial silo recedes into the background while the elevated metro structure remains visible to the right, and the view opens up to show the surrounding industrial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered industrial corridor into a wide, open urban intersection. It begins by walking along a sidewalk beneath a massive elevated metro structure illuminated by orange lights, passing digital billboards and a pedestrian in red pants. As the camera emerges from under the tracks, the environment opens up to reveal a towering cylindrical industrial silo on the left and palm trees lining the approach to the street. The scene then shifts from the covered walkway into the open air of a busy intersection, where the camera crosses the asphalt amidst a flow of futuristic vehicles and a red delivery van. Finally, the view expands to encompass the surrounding industrial district as the silo recedes into the background and the metro structure remains visible to the right.
